Counting Errors per Run: Raw Responses

← Mean-per-page comparison (visualization)

Every individual model run for each of the 10 counting questions. Rows are grouped by page; within each page, one row per model showing all 10 individual run responses (t1–t10) against the ground truth. The naive and guided conditions sit side by side in one table so each page/model row can be compared directly across the two conditions. Cells are color-coded by signed error magnitude.

Cell color: correct (error 0) ±1 ±2 ±3 ±4 or more no parseable response
